title: Column Configuration Schema
description: Schema for validating column configuration files used by the Perplexity Validator

general_notes.description: General notes about the configuration and validation guidelines

default_model.description: Default model to use for validation (e.g., 'sonar', 'sonar-pro', 'claude-sonnet-4')

default_search_context_size.description: Default search context size for Perplexity models

anthropic_max_web_searches_default.description: Default maximum web searches for Anthropic models (0-10). 0=disable web search entirely, 1=obvious items, 3=complex items, 5=esoteric facts.  Caution when increasing this number as it can get expensive, especially as the default.

qc_settings.description: Quality Control settings for automated review of validation outputs

enable_qc.description: Enable or disable Quality Control review

max_tokens_default.description: Default maximum tokens for QC processing

tokens_per_validated_column_default.description: Additional tokens per validated column for QC

model.description: QC model(s) to use. Can be string or array of models for fallback

anthropic_max_web_searches.description: Maximum web searches for QC (0-10). 0=disable web search entirely (default for cost efficiency)

search_groups.description: Required search group definitions for organizing columns - essential for building effective search strategy

group_id.description: Unique identifier for the search group

group_name.description: Descriptive name for the search group

description.description: Description of what this search group represents

model.description: Model to use for this search group

search_context.description: Search context size for this group

anthropic_max_web_searches.description: Override max web searches for Anthropic models in this search group (0-10). 0=disable web search entirely, caution when increasing this number as it can get expensive

description.description: Description of what this column represents

format.description: Expected format of the column data (e.g., 'String', 'Date', 'Number', 'URL')

notes.description: Additional notes about validation rules and formatting

search_group.description: Search group ID this column belongs to

preferred_model.description: Override model for this specific column

search_context_size.description: Override search context size for this column
